args.name: status

args.name: status
args.description: Whether to allow the OS to make certain elements semi-transparent

args.name: threshold
args.description: The threshold above which antialiasing is turned on

args.name: size
args.description: The size of the icons in various window sidebars

args.name: color
args.description: The color used for the majority of the interface elements

args.description: Delete .DS_Store files recursively in a specific path

subcommands.description: Changes how long it takes to detect you want to show up the dock

args.name: YES/NO
args.description: YES/NO to turn magnification on or off

subcommands.description: Add a blank space (separator) to the Dock

subcommands.description: Add a stack containg your recent items to the Dock

args.name: YES/NO
args.description: YES/NO to show all file extensions

args.description: YES/NO to show the current opened folder path on the top bar of the Finder window

script: networksetup -listallhardwareports | awk '/Wi-Fi/{getline; print $2}' | xargs networksetup -listpreferredwirelessnetworks | tail -n +2
